testcase.name: initializeBrowser

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'LAPTOP-TP5BMD4N', ip: '192.168.1.4'

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure.
